user_prompt: Draw a coordinate plane with a circle centered at origin O with radius 5. Plot three candidate points: P1 = (3, 4), P2 = (4, 4), and P3 = (−3, 4). For each point draw a right triangle from the origin to the point, with legs along the x and y directions. I want to check which ones satisfy x² + y² = 25. Label all three points and mark the right angle at the base of each triangle.
